title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL technologies. The lecture includes best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The course is offered by Harvard University through multiple platforms including edX.
